source_notes.rosstat: rosstat.gov.ru — weekly retail fuel prices by federal subject, DNR/LNR/Zaporizhzhia/Kherson rows
source_notes.telegram: Local community channels — Mariupol, Donetsk, Luhansk. Keywords: гречка, сахар, дефицит, пустые полки, очередь, тушёнка, нет топлива
source_notes.avito: avito.ru — grey market staple goods listings in occupied cities vs mainland equivalents

panic_basket.rationale: Buckwheat (гречка) is the single most reliable panic indicator in Russian/Ukrainian cultural space — disappears within hours of genuine shock. Documented in 2014 Crimea annexation, Sep 2022 mobilization announcement. Sugar and canned meat follow. Salt is extreme signal. Avito grey market activation = official retail has failed entirely.

sources: Euronews, June 12 2026 — Sevastopol fuel rationing reduced from 20L/day to 20L/week (~7x reduction), citing occupation governor Mikhail Razvozhaev. QR-code purchase system introduced June 6 via Max messenger app.
Euronews description: 'worst fuel crisis on the Black Sea peninsula since 2014 annexation.'

Note: fuel_score is sourced from occupation-government-acknowledged rationing order — highest confidence source tier in the dataset. Panic keyword score from Telegram (0 hits pre-June 10 window) not yet reflecting post-rationing-announcement period.
monthly_readings.fuel_score_methodology: Rationing at 20L/week vs 20L/day = 86% reduction in daily allowance. Occupation government public acknowledgment = maximum confidence. Score 88: at top of scale (ceiling 100 reserved for total supply cutoff). Prior dataset maximum was 73 (Apr 2026).
monthly_readings.note: STRUCTURAL EVENT: Sevastopol rationing 20L/week — occupation-government sourced, highest confidence fuel reading in dataset. CCI computed from fuel_score only (partial); panic_keyword_score=0 from pre-announcement Telegram window, avito_premium_score pending. CCI will rise when panic_keyword and avito catch up to rationing shock.

alert_thresholds.notes: Above 25 = elevated civilian stress visible in informal channels. Above 45 = multi-signal confirmation of acute shortage conditions. Above 65 = systemic civilian confidence failure — buckwheat index activating alongside fuel and grey market signals simultaneously.

divergence_note: If CCI rises while permanence ratio (Track B) holds stable, residents are riding out a temporary shock while maintaining long-term commitment — durable but stressed. If both CCI and permanence ratio move in the same direction simultaneously, behavioral change is likely imminent. Monitor divergence between 30-day survival signal and 30-year commitment signal as primary compound indicator.
